candidates.title: Safety-State Persistence Regression Guard
candidates.description: Committed static checker and companion tests that prevent reintroduction of fixed <target>.tmp writes in the four CAND-009 safety persistence modules. Allows atomic_write.py as the unique mkstemp-based temp helper. Integrated into dev/CI/quick release gates.
notes: Accepted into the v0.6.18 candidate chain on 2026-07-01.
Released as part of the v0.6.18 GitHub-only release on 2026-07-01.
Does not enable live trading, live submit, order placement, broker/provider execution, credential loading, network access, or approval queue mutation.
